title: Running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock
summary: AWS Bedrock enables deployment of Claude Code with data residency compliance, featuring cross-region inference, prompt caching, cost tracking per team, and content guardrails. The new Mantle endpoint provides an additional deployment option for organizations with strict compliance requirements.
writeup: The video covers running Claude Code on Amazon Bedrock, showing how the setup supports data residency compliance through cross-region inference and a new Mantle endpoint aimed at organizations with strict compliance requirements. It matters because it positions Bedrock as a deployment path for Claude Code's agentic workflows inside controlled environments rather than a default hosted setting. Key takeaways: Bedrock adds prompt caching, per-team cost tracking, and content guardrails, and the Mantle endpoint provides an additional deployment option.
